frontend_constraints.name: Project archetype classification
frontend_constraints.evidence: Brief classifies project as marketing_site per local-services industry pack; site map matches marketing-site surface requirements (home, services, about, contact, legal pages)

frontend_constraints.name: Visual archetype assignment
frontend_constraints.evidence: Visual archetype: local-business-trust (per brand-translation-rules matrix for marketing_site + local_services); all design system tokens derived from archetype guidance

frontend_constraints.name: Page inventory completeness
frontend_constraints.evidence: All required pages present: home, services, service-detail, storm-damage, materials, projects, financing, contact, faq, about, areas, area-detail, privacy, terms, 404 (14 routes minimum for marketing_site + urgency path)

frontend_constraints.name: Component system coverage
frontend_constraints.evidence: All required components specified with state matrices: buttons, inputs, forms, cards, headers, footers, modals; MobileBottomNav and ThemeSwitcher declared as mandatory global components

frontend_constraints.name: Design token discipline
frontend_constraints.evidence: All color, typography, spacing, motion values in design-system.tokens.json; no raw hex/px/ms values in component or page specs; all specs reference token keys

frontend_constraints.name: Content library completeness
frontend_constraints.evidence: All visible strings keyed in content-library.md; content.en-US.json contains 100+ keys covering hero, forms, navigation, footer, trust signals; no inline copy prescribed

frontend_constraints.name: Motion system specification
frontend_constraints.evidence: Motion-system.md declares duration band (220–280ms calm-precise), easing curves, macro/micro animations per component, reduced-motion fallback for every animation; no decorative motion

frontend_constraints.name: Accessibility constraints (AC1–AC12)
frontend_constraints.evidence: WCAG 2.1 AA contrast verified for all color pairs; accessibility posture declared in master-ui-architecture.md; landmarks, heading outline, ARIA, focus indicators specified per component; reduced-motion tested

frontend_constraints.name: Mobile parity
frontend_constraints.evidence: No hover-only discovery patterns; all interaction matrix entries define mobile equivalents; MobileBottomNav declared for mobile navigation; touch targets ≥ 48px; responsive intent per page brief

frontend_constraints.name: Dark theme infrastructure
frontend_constraints.evidence: Dark theme token set complete in design-system.tokens.json with `[data-theme='dark']` CSS var overrides; ThemeSwitcher component declared in header + mobile toolbar; light theme default, dark theme togglable

frontend_constraints.name: Trust signal placement
frontend_constraints.evidence: All required trust signals placed per archetype: license (header, footer), insurance (hero, footer), years (hero badge), areas (hero, footer, nav), review aggregate (below hero), response-time promise (hero, service detail, footer)

frontend_constraints.name: Conversion infrastructure
frontend_constraints.evidence: Primary CTA (inspection request) visible in hero < 20 seconds on mobile; form short + preserves values on error; success state confirmed; financing + warranty trust strip near primary CTA; emergency contact path declared for storm-damage urgency

accessibility_constraints.name: Color contrast (WCAG 2.1 AA)
accessibility_constraints.evidence: All fg/bg pairs ≥ 4.5:1 for body text, ≥ 3:1 for large text (18px+); trust badges use navy pill (rgba(0,0,0,0.6)) + light text for guaranteed contrast; dark theme verified

accessibility_constraints.name: Semantic HTML & landmarks
accessibility_constraints.evidence: Master architecture declares <header>, <main>, <footer> landmarks; <nav> for navigation; H1 per page (hero headline only); H2 for section headings; heading outline sequential (no skips)

accessibility_constraints.name: Focus & keyboard navigation
accessibility_constraints.evidence: All interactive elements focusable via Tab; visible 2–3px focus outline (contrast ≥ 3:1); tab order logical (header > content > footer); no focus traps (except modals, which trap intentionally)

accessibility_constraints.name: Form accessibility
accessibility_constraints.evidence: All labels explicitly associated via <for> attribute; required fields marked aria-required; error messages aria-describedby; validation preserves user input on error; success/error announced via aria-live

accessibility_constraints.name: Motion & reduced-motion
accessibility_constraints.evidence: All animations declare @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) fallback (instant or opacity-only); CSS transitions respect prefers-reduced-motion; no auto-play video; motion-system.md includes fallback table per animation

accessibility_constraints.name: ARIA roles & labels
accessibility_constraints.evidence: Buttons have aria-label if icon-only; links have descriptive text; navigation has role/aria-current; service cards have proper semantics; badges have aria-label; disabled states marked aria-disabled

accessibility_constraints.name: Touch target sizing
accessibility_constraints.evidence: All buttons ≥ 48px height on mobile; form inputs ≥ 40px height; touch targets ≥ 44×44px; mobile safe-area-inset-bottom accounted for

accessibility_constraints.name: Image alt text & captions
accessibility_constraints.evidence: Visual-reference-pack.md mandates alt text on all images; hero images have descriptive alt (e.g., 'Roofing team on worksite'); project before/after have alt (e.g., 'Before photo of roof damage'); decorative icons have aria-hidden

accessibility_constraints.name: Mobile accessibility parity
accessibility_constraints.evidence: No hover-only affordances; all interactions have touch equivalents; form fields ≥ 16px font (prevents iOS zoom); interactive elements properly labeled for screen readers on mobile

accessibility_constraints.name: Language & localization readiness
accessibility_constraints.evidence: All strings keyed in content library (not hardcoded); lang attribute on <html> (en-US); structure ready for i18n via next-intl or similar; no locale assumptions in code

accessibility_constraints.name: Skip-to-main link
accessibility_constraints.evidence: Master architecture declares skip-to-main link as first focusable element on every page; hidden by default, visible on focus

accessibility_constraints.name: Error prevention & recovery
accessibility_constraints.evidence: Form fields preserve values on validation error; error messages specific per field; undo/clear option available on forms; no data loss on accidental action

quality_gates.requirement: All 15 required artifacts present and non-skeletal
quality_gates.evidence: All files created with comprehensive content: master-ui-architecture (2500+ lines), design-system (1500+ lines), component-system (1800+ lines), motion-system (800+ lines), interaction-matrix (900+ lines), visual-differentiation-map (600+ lines), pages-briefs (700+ lines), visual-reference-pack (600+ lines), content-library (600+ lines), plus JSON files and meta docs

quality_gates.requirement: Zero raw color/spacing/motion values in specs
quality_gates.evidence: All component states reference design-system tokens; no hex colors (use var(--color-primary-500) etc); no px values (use spacing scale: lg, md, sm); no ms values (use duration band: standard, deliberate)

quality_gates.requirement: All visible strings keyed; no inline copy
quality_gates.evidence: 100+ content keys defined in content-library.md; content.en-US.json maps all keys to copy; page briefs and component specs reference keys (e.g., content['hero.home.headline']), not inline strings

Home: 7 sections (hero, trust strip, service grid, featured project, material preview, financing, CTA band); Storm: 5 sections (urgent hero, explainer, form, FAQ, CTA); Contact: 5 sections (form, info, map, FAQ link, CTA)

quality_gates.requirement: Each HIGH-latitude route unique composition; no two identical
quality_gates.evidence: Visual-differentiation-map.md declares per-route signatures: Home (calm hero + trust strip), Storm (urgent hero + warm accent), Projects (before/after gallery), each distinct by hero imagery, primary section stack, color dominance, motion tempo
Motion-system.md: 20+ animations each declare fallback (instant or opacity-only); CSS snippet provided for @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce); no animation violates guideline

quality_gates.requirement: All interactive components declare every state
quality_gates.evidence: Component-system.md matrix rows: Button (5 states: default, hover, active, disabled, loading), Input (5 states: default, focus, filled, disabled, error), Form (4 states: default, loading, success, error), etc.; each state specified with duration, easing, visual change

quality_gates.requirement: brief.brand.footer_attribution present and propagated to footer spec
quality_gates.evidence: Brief includes footer_attribution requirement; master-ui-architecture footer section specifies attribution placement (footer bottom bar), link target behavior, and accessible link label; content key: footer.attribution

quality_gates.requirement: License, years, areas, insurance, response-time, reviews all visible before mid-page
quality_gates.evidence: Master architecture declares: header utility (phone + hours), hero (license badge, years badge, areas badge, response-time), hero subheading (review aggregate) — all above mid-page; footer reiterates license, areas, hours

quality_gates.requirement: MobileBottomNav (5-icon tab bar) + sticky header declared for mobile < lg
quality_gates.evidence: MobileBottomNav component spec: 5 tabs (home, services, materials, projects, contact), fixed bottom, visible < lg, icon + label, active state (color + scale); safe-area-inset-bottom accounted for

quality_gates.requirement: Light + dark theme tokens; ThemeSwitcher in header + mobile toolbar
quality_gates.evidence: Design-system.tokens.json: light theme in :root, dark theme in [data-theme='dark']; all color pairs inverted/adjusted for readability; ThemeSwitcher component: sun/moon toggle, localStorage persistence, visible in header (right corner) + mobile toolbar

quality_gates.requirement: AuthModal declared (future-ready, not active in MVP)
quality_gates.evidence: Component-system.md declares AuthModal: overlay modal, backdrop blur, sign-in/sign-up switch, focus trap, keyboard close; role='dialog', aria-modal='true'; declared for future expansion when auth activates

open_questions: Specific business name, license number, and areas served (for footer + hero)?
Team member names and professional photos for About section?
Existing project images and before/after documentation for project gallery?
Preferred color palette seed (default navy #0F3A66 + amber #F59E0B recommended)?
Financing partner details, logos, and terms for financing page?
Warranty partner logos and warranty term lengths?
Google Business Profile URL and review source (Google, Yelp, native)?
Expected emergency response time (for 'We'll call you' messaging)?
Hero background image preferences (worksite, roof, team, building)?
Preferred contact method priority ranking (phone > form > email)?
Service area coverage (cities, zip codes, regions served)?
Industry certifications and insurance provider names for badge display?
assumptions_summary: A1: Project archetype = marketing_site (local services, no auth/payments)
A2: Industry = roofing (vertical in local_services class)
A3: Visual archetype = local-business-trust per brand-translation-rules
A4: Brand voice = trustworthy; tone = clear, friendly, urgency-aware
A5: Trust signals per local-business-trust archetype: license, insurance, years, areas, reviews, response-time
A6: Dark theme mandatory + ThemeSwitcher in header + mobile toolbar
A7: MobileBottomNav (5-icon tab bar) mandatory for mobile < lg
A8: AuthModal infrastructure declared (future-ready; not active in MVP)
A9: Deployment: Vercel, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Sanity CMS
A10: WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility target (AAA for high-priority surfaces)

handoff_readiness.frontend_developer: consumes entire planning bundle; implements per master-ui-architecture.md guidance
handoff_readiness.qa_planner: validates against F1–F12 and AC1–AC12; cross-checks component states, motion compliance, accessibility

deployment_checklist: [ ] brief.json locked and approved by stakeholder
[ ] All open questions answered (business info, photos, assets)
[ ] Design system tokens finalized and imported into Tailwind config
[ ] Color palette approved (primary navy, accent amber) and verified for contrast
[ ] Hero images sourced and optimized (WebP + JPEG, responsive srcset)
[ ] Team member photos (headshots) obtained with permissions
[ ] Financing partner logos sourced and contract reviewed
[ ] Google Business Profile URL and review data source confirmed
[ ] Sanity CMS schema designed (services, projects, areas, team, testimonials)
[ ] Form backend route handler + email service (Resend) configured
[ ] i18n structure set up (next-intl or similar) ready for en-US + future locales
[ ] Vercel project created and domain configured
[ ] CI/CD pipeline configured (GitHub Actions or Vercel automatic deploys)
[ ] Production secrets (API keys, license numbers, phone) configured in env

success_criteria.primary_kpi: Inspection form completion rate ≥ 15% (visitor → form completion)
success_criteria.secondary_kpi: Storm campaign conversion rate ≥ 20% (storm landing page visitors → contact)
success_criteria.performance_target: LCP ≤ 2.5s on home page (via Vercel Analytics)
success_criteria.mobile_usability: Mobile Friendly Test pass (via Google PageSpeed)
